sections.label: 1. Call the regular meeting to order. 7:00 P.M.
a. Presentation of a proclamation acknowledging February as Black History Month in the City of Fairfax.
b. Presentation by Metropolitan Washington Council of Governments (COG) on the history of COG and DMVMoves.

5. Initial general public comment period (A maximum of three (3) minutes per speaker for any city matters not requiring a public hearing. The speakers who have registered with the city clerk’s office (703-385-7935) prior to 5:00 p.m. the day of the m
j. Introduction of an ordinance amending Chapter 38 (Environment), Article II (Noise) to amend the City's noise regulations.
a. Public hearing and Council action on the adoption of the Urban Forest Master Plan (UFMP).

8. Second general public comment period (a maximum of three (3) minutes per speaker for any city matters not requiring a public hearing – limited to speakers who did not speak under initial general public comment period).
10. Recess the regular meeting to go into a work session.
a. Joint meeting of the Planning Commission and City Council regarding the Draft FY 2027-2031 CIP.
b. Update and discussion on the joint City/County redevelopment of the Sherwood Community Center and Willard Health Center Complex.
15. Council Comments and Committee reports out (if needed).
